data.title: Generic ViDA Sample Invoice - INV-001 (Goods)
data.note:
FICTITIOUS INVOICE - DO NOT PAY - DO NOT USE IN TAX RETURNS!
This is a generic sample invoice to cover a "regular" invoicing use case in ViDA.
As such, the seller and buyer are located in two different EU member states.
data.introText: In the ViDA Pilot project, a number of test scenarios are defined to execute the entire flow of documents in a realistic setting.

payment.terms: Please remit your payment of [Endbetrag] [Währung] before [Fälligkeitsdatum].

items.name: Great Good (std rate VAT)
items.description: This Great Good is invoiced with a standard VAT rate to force a non-zero value in the VAT Breakdown for test purposes.

items.name: Great Good (exempt of VAT for IC supply-Code E)
items.description: This Great Good is invoiced with a 0% VAT rate and "E" tax code to indicate use of the ICS tax exemption. This needs a mention of: "VAT exempt intra-community supply (Article 138 Directive 2006/112/EC)" (There is no VATEX code value for this)

items.name: Great Good (exempt of VAT for IC supply)
items.description: This Great Good is invoiced with a 0% VAT rate and "AE" tax code to indicate use of the ICS tax exemption.

data.introText: In the ViDA Pilot project, a number of test scenarios are defined to execute the entire flow of documents in a realistic setting.

data.terms: Please remit your payment of [Endbetrag] [Währung] before [Fälligkeitsdatum].
Please remit your payment of [Endbetrag] [Währung] before [Fälligkeitsdatum].

data.name: Great Good (Std rate VAT)
data.description: This Great Good is invoiced with a standard VAT rate to force a non-zero value in the VAT Breakdown for test purposes.

data.name: Great Good (exempt of VAT for IC supply-Code K)
data.description: This Great Good is invoiced with a 0% VAT rate and "K" tax code to indicate use of the ICS tax exemption. This needs a mention of: "VAT exempt intra-community supply (Article 138 Directive 2006/112/EC)" and VATEX-EU-IC code in BT-121

data.name: Great Good (exempt of VAT for import/export supply-Code G)
data.description: This Great Good is invoiced with a 0% VAT rate and "G" tax code to indicate use of the import/export tax exemption. This needs a mention of: "Import/export to a non-EU country (Article 146 Directive 2006/112/EC." and VATEX-EU-G code in BT-121

data.name: Super Service (exempt of VAT reverse charge)
data.description: This Super Service is invoiced with a 0% VAT rate and "AE" tax code to indicate use of the reverse charge tax exemption. Needs VATEX-EU-AE in BT-121 and "Reverse Charge applies." in BT-120.

data.name: Super Service (std rate VAT)
data.description: This Super Service is invoiced with a standard VAT rate to force a non-zero value in the VAT Breakdown for test purposes.

data.name: Best Book (Zero rate VAT)
data.description: This Best Book (as example) is invoiced as taxable with a zero VAT rate (Books, certain basic foods, specific logistics services, some medical care). Generally, no further info is needed in BT-120/BT-121.

invoice-deliveries-store.name: Slovenský Príklad s.r.o. (BT-80 must be specified for ICS)
